_notes.note_main_file: id=51 Improved Mind Blast (spec_tree=-1) is a Shadow-tree talent (tier 2) — not duplicated here.
note_bit_sharing: mask2 bit10 (0x400=1024) is the shared Priest family marker — ALWAYS exclude.
Mind Flay (15407) has mask2=0x440=1088: unique bit is mask2 bit6 (64); exclude mask2 bit10 (1024).
Shadowform mask0 bit31 (0x80000000=2147483648) is SHARED with Pain Suppression and Power Infusion — use mask1 bit11 (2048) as the unique Shadowform identifier instead.
Vampiric Touch mask1=0x400=1024 (bit10 of mask1) is DISTINCT from mask2=1024 (bit10 of mask2).
pending_spellinfo: .spellinfo all 586   -- Fade (for id=188 Improved Fade / Veiled Shadows Fade portion)
.spellinfo all 605   -- Mind Control (optional addition to id=184 Focused Mind)

talent_affixes.name: Improved Shadow Word: Pain
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[32768,0,0]=0x8000 (mask0 bit15). Exclude mask2=1024 (shared). SW:Pain duration +3s/rank (DURATION FLAT: 3000=3s).

talent_affixes.name: Shadow Focus
talent_affixes.notes: Shadow spell resist chance -1%/rank (RESIST_MISS_CHANCE FLAT: -100=-1%). All-ones used since 'Shadow school' cannot be targeted by Priest family SpellMod directly.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Mind Blast
talent_affixes.notes: Mind Blast cooldown -0.5s per rank — flags confirmed: 0x2000=8192 (mask0 bit13).

talent_affixes.name: Shadow Affinity
talent_affixes.notes: Shadow spell threat -10%/rank. All-ones matches every Priest spell.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Vampiric Embrace
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4,0,0]=0x4 (mask0 bit2). Vampiric Embrace healing from Shadow damage +33%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Fade
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16384,0,0]: Fade(586) mask0 bit14(0x4000=16384). Exclude mask2=1024 (shared) AND mask1 bit12=4096 (shared with Pain Suppression/Power Infusion). Fade cooldown -6s/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Focused Mind
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[139264,0,64]: Mind Blast(8092) mask0 bit13(0x2000=8192) | Mind Control(605) mask0 bit17(0x20000=131072) → mask0=139264; Mind Flay(15407) mask2 bit6(0x40=64, exclude mask2 bit10=1024). Mana cost -5%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Misery (3r, tier 3) — Applies a debuff reducing target's spell hit/haste/crit. Target-side debuff mechanic, not a caster SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Shadow Power
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[8192,0,64]: Mind Blast(8092)+Mind Flay(15407). Critical strike damage bonus +20%/rank (CRIT_DAMAGE FLAT: assumed 100=1%, so 2000=20% — verify unit in-game).

talent_affixes._todo: Pain and Suffering (3r, tier 4) — SW:Death crits refresh SW:Pain duration. Proc-based, not SpellMod.
Vampiric Embrace (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Darkness
talent_affixes.notes: All Shadow spell damage +2%/rank. All-ones used since 'Shadow school' cannot be targeted by Priest family SpellMod; acceptable for Shadow spec affixes.

talent_affixes._todo: Shadowform (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Vampiric Touch (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Veiled Shadows
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,262144,0]: Dispersion(47585) mask1 bit18(0x40000=262144, exclude mask2=1024). Dispersion cooldown -45s/rank. NOTE: Fade(-6s/rank) is the other half of this talent — add as separate entry once '.spellinfo all 586' is confirmed.

talent_affixes._todo: Twisted Faith (5r, tier 8) — (1) Increases spell power from Spirit by 5%/rank AND (2) Mind Flay damage +5%/rank when target has SW:Pain. The conditional part (requires debuff) is not implementable as SpellMod. The SP-from-Spirit is a stat conversion.
Dispersion (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
